title: Shoals Technologies Group Q2 2024 Earnings: Beat Expectations
text: Shoals Technologies reported Q2 2024 results that exceeded analyst expectations on both metrics. Revenue was $99.2 million, down 17% year-over-year. Net Income was $11.8 million, down 38% year-over-year. EPS was $0.069, down from $0.11 in the prior year. Profit Margin was 12%, down from 16%. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 8.9% while Earnings per share (EPS) also surpassed analyst estimates by 74%. Management projects revenue growth of 11% annually over the next three years, outpacing the electrical industry's forecasted 7.8% growth rate. Despite the earnings beat, the share price declined 17% over the past week, indicating market concerns despite strong results relative to expectations. The company indicated that approximately $40 million of revenue moved from the current year into 2025 due to various project delays related to permitting, interconnection queues, equipment shortages, labor constraints, and high financing costs.
